results.title: Aug 31, 2024; Cleveland, Ohio, USA; Cleveland Guardians relief pitcher Pedro Avila (60) reacts after getting the third out during the seventh inning against the Pittsburgh Pirates at Progressive Field. Mandatory Credit: Ken Blaze-USA TODAY Sports
results.description: The Cleveland Guardians released reliever Pedro Avila just a few weeks ago, and now, the 29-year-old has already signed with a new organization. Avila will play for the SSG Landers of the Korea Baseball Organization for the rest of the season.

results.title: Training ground effort on show in Caley Jags win
results.description: Inverness eased to victory in their second League Cup group game of the season, with Scott Kellacher delighted with his side’s display.
